brand.name: Nosko
brand.tone: Reliable, Fast, Modern, Functional, Construction-style Brutalism

typography.rules: High contrast weights (Black for headings, Regular for body). Tight tracking for headings (`tracking-tighter`). No generic fonts for display. Use uppercase overlines with heavy tracking (`tracking-[0.2em]`).

layout_and_spacing.system: The Bento Grid Protocol. Mode B (Control Room Grid) for Dashboards, Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Landing. Use the Swiss Grid layout, overlapping elements and exposed grid lines.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous spacing philosophy (`p-8`, `p-12`). Containers with borders must have internal padding (`p-6` or `p-8`) to prevent text collision. Asymmetry preferred for marketing.

components.name: App
components.instructions: Main router setup. Includes public routes (Landing), and protected dashboard routes.

components.name: LandingPage
components.instructions: Public marketing page. Heavy typographic hero section with 'Switch/Outlet Replacement $25' pricing block. Clear CTAs: 'Book Job', 'Become a Handyman', 'Join Marketer Program'. Use `nosko_hero_bg` and real tools/repairing outlet images. Use 'Marquee' for scrolling text like 'FAST REPAIRS - $25 MINIMUM'. Grid borders visible.

components.name: JobRequestPage
components.instructions: Customer job request flow. Minimalist form. Photo upload dropzone (Shadcn customized, sharp corners). Description input. Clear pricing details ($25 base, $25 min) on the side. W9 not needed here.

components.name: WorkerSignupPage
components.instructions: Worker onboarding. Collect: hours, skills, location. Include W9 signing section (typed signature + PDF upload dropzone). Brutalist, step-by-step layout.

components.name: MarketerSignupPage
components.instructions: Marketer onboarding. Explains 15% profit share. W9 signing section (typed signature + PDF upload). Generates personal code visually.

components.name: DashboardLayout
components.instructions: Shared shell for Worker, Marketer, and Admin. Sidebar with clear, high-contrast navigation. Top header with user profile.

components.name: WorkerDashboard
components.instructions: Dashboard showing earnings metrics (Weekly, Monthly, Yearly) in sharp bento boxes. List of jobs assigned. Minimal, high density grid. No soft shadows.

components.name: MarketerDashboard
components.instructions: Dashboard showing unique referral link (copy to clipboard), and earnings breakdown chart (Recharts).

components.name: AdminDashboard
components.instructions: Command center. Tabs: 1. Jobs (View requests + photos), 2. Workers (Pay via Stripe Connect button), 3. Marketers, 4. Portfolio (Upload before/after photos to site).

visual_enhancers.surfaces: GRID BORDERS (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. 1px borders everywhere (`border-collapse`). High contrast black borders on hover.
visual_enhancers.buttons: Sharp corners (`rounded-none`). Hover state: slight lift (`-translate-y-1`), solid black shadow. Primary CTA in `#FFD600`, text `#0A0A0A`.
visual_enhancers.icons: lucide-react (default) with sharp, solid variations when possible.
